name: @deckup/theme-default
description: An editorial theme with serif headings, cool blue accents, and balanced light and dark palettes.

cover.description: Centers an opening title within a subtle circular frame and blue-accented subtitle.

default.description: Presents general content in a vertically centered, left-aligned editorial composition.

number.description: Highlights a key metric with an oversized blue serif number and supporting caption.

page.description: Organizes detailed content beneath a compact serif heading and short blue divider.

quote.description: Centers an italic serif quotation with an oversized blue quotation mark and uppercase attribution.

section.description: Introduces a new section with a centered italic serif heading and blue divider.

statement.description: Centers a single prominent italic serif statement for emphasis.

two-column.description: Places a shared heading above balanced left and right columns with editorial spacing.
